title: Create: Armored Constructs
description: Military themed addon for Create focused on armored construction and vehicle building.
body:
![banner 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34f245b597f19d7c74aeb1c30638e1a77b3b1505_0.webp)


Military themed addon for Create focused on armored construction and vehicle building.

Create: Armored Constructs adds armored building blocks for tanks, fortifications, industrial structures and other military styled projects. The mod includes connected textures, paint customization and camouflage patterns for more detailed and realistic builds.

The current focus of the mod is armored vehicles and heavy military machinery, while future updates will expand the mod with new building components, decorative elements and additional engineering possibilities for larger Create based projects
